news.title: Andre Cronje, two others resign from Sonic Labs board as S token trades 97% below its peak
news.summary: Sonic Labs said the three "remain invested in Sonic's success" but will no longer make business decisions for the Layer 1 network, formerly Fantom.

news.title: Where is Bitcoin headed? Does it still have the "cypherpunk" goals?
news.summary:
Genuine question, please be respectful. Is Bitcoin ever going to attempt to scale on the L1? or is it just going to count on institutions/third parties to distribute paper bitcoin to the world?

I know Bitcoin is infinitely divisible and limited in supply. These strengths make it one of a kind, but does it really matter if it can't be distributed to the whole world fairly and without censorship? Is there any innovation planned or are we forever stuck on ne
